steps.title: Use the solved-after clue
steps.content: The conjecture was posed in 1970 and yielded to a proof only in 2018. That setup implies the conjecture resisted mathematicians' efforts for a long time, so the blank needs a word meaning baffled or defeated.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content: A means satisfied or calmed, B means ignored, and D means taught beliefs by repetition. None describes an unsolved mathematical problem frustrating researchers. The word meaning baffled fits the context. The answer is C.
